description: Fixture ids seeded by android/maestro/helpers/seed-editorial-corpus.sh. Screen verification flows reference these ids instead of magic strings.

projects.firestoreNote: The Android SDK addresses Firestore under the app's own project id (google-services.json) even against the emulator — seeds MUST live there.
projects.authNote: Key-based (client SDK) auth requests resolve to the emulator suite's DEFAULT project — playster-406121 per backend/.firebaserc — so the fixture account must live there. Override with AUTH_PROJECT_ID only if the suite is started with an explicit different --project.

user.uid: pinned at seed time to the operator allowlist literal in backend/firestore.rules (never hardcoded here)

videos.realIdsNote: Curated REAL YouTube ids, probe-proven embeddable (2026-07-19). Seeded as the videoId FIELD and every videoId-keyed doc path (transcripts/, summaries/, users/*/progress/, notes+highlights body fields); playlist-episode doc paths keep the synthetic ed-vNN. If one rots (stops embedding), the featured episode shows the embed-error surface — replace the id here AND in write-editorial-corpus.js REAL_VIDEO_IDS.

deferred.special-case-live-ids: An embed-DISABLED and a region-locked live id (for driving the error surfaces against real restrictions) remain unrecorded — the error paths are driven by forced bad ids / airplane mode instead. The embeddable curated set landed in videos.realIds (2026-07-19).
